items.title: There are more AI health tools than ever—but how well do they work?
items.summary: Earlier this month, Microsoft launched Copilot Health, a new space within its Copilot app where users will be able to connect their medical records and ask specific questions about their health.
items.cn_title: 微软推出健康助手Copilot Health
items.cn_summary: 微软早前在其Copilot应用内推出新功能Copilot Health，用户在此可以连接医疗记录，并就健康问题提出具体查询。

items.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
items.summary: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.
items.cn_title: AI芯片初创Rebellions融资4亿美元 估值达23亿
items.cn_summary: 计划今年上市的Rebellions，设计专用于AI推理的芯片，将成为Nvidia的又一竞争对手。

items.title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security
items.summary:
Learn how to secure your projects and keep them safe with GitHub Advanced Security.
The post GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.cn_summary: 掌握如何利用GitHub高级安全功能保护你的项目不被恶意攻击。该教程首先发表在GitHub官方博客上。

items.title: Why OpenAI really shut down Sora
items.summary: OpenAI's decision last week to shut down Sora, its AI video-generation tool, just six months after releasing it to the public, raised immediate suspicions. The app had invited users to upload their own faces — so was this some kind of elaborate data grab?
items.cn_title: OpenAI紧急下线其AI视频生成工具Sora
items.cn_summary: OpenAI上周决定关闭Sora，引发外界猜测。该工具上线仅半年，允许用户上传人脸，难道是在收集数据？

items.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
items.summary: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.
items.cn_summary: LiteLLM通过Delve获得两项安全合规认证，上周却惨遭恶意软件偷取凭证。

items.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss
items.summary: Your human manager may soon be a chatbot. Across organizations, AI is being used to replace layers of management in what some are calling "The Great Flattening."
items.cn_title: 超过15%美国人愿意为AI老板打工
items.cn_summary: 未来，你的人工经理可能变成聊天机器人。各组织开始用AI取代管理层，这种现象被称为“大扁平化”。

items.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
items.summary: AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll.
items.cn_title: 美民众对AI工具信任度走低
items.cn_summary: 尽管美国AI工具使用率上升，但根据昆尼皮亚克大学的最新民调，多数美国人对AI的信任度不高，主要担忧透明度、监管以及技术对社会的广泛影响。

items.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
items.summary: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.
items.cn_summary: 为应对GPU短缺和AI云服务成本激增，ScaleOps近期完成了1.3亿美元的融资，旨在通过实时自动化基础设施提升计算效率。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.cn_title: 亚洲灾害响应团队利用AI加速救援
items.cn_summary: 亚洲灾害响应行动中引入AI技术，通过与盖茨基金会合作的OpenAI研讨会探讨如何将智能技术应用于紧急救援行动，提升亚洲地区灾害响应速度和效率。

items.title: The Pentagon’s culture war tactic against Anthropic has backfired
items.summary: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here.
items.cn_title: 五角大楼对Anthropic的文化战策略适得其反
items.cn_summary: 本周《算法》时事通讯中报道了五角大楼针对Anthropic的文化战策略，其负面效应不容小觑，欲知详情，可订阅关注。
